summary: Resume contains critical truthfulness violations: fabricated job titles (SRE vs actual DevOps Engineer), unsupported SLO/error budget claims, and misrepresented role responsibilities that could fail background verification at HDFC Securities.

issues.issue: Job title fabricated: resume shows 'Site Reliability Engineer' and 'Site Reliability Engineer Intern' but candidate's actual title is 'DevOps Engineer' and 'DevOps Engineer Intern' per master brief section 2
issues.where: "role": "Site Reliability Engineer" and "role": "Site Reliability Engineer Intern"
issues.suggestion: Change to 'DevOps Engineer' and 'DevOps Engineer Intern' — or if applying to SRE roles, use 'DevOps Engineer (SRE-aligned)' with explanation, but never fabricate title

issues.issue: SLO monitoring claim is fabricated — master brief states 'continuous SLO monitoring' is NOT in inventory; candidate has '99.9% uptime SLA' but no SLOs, error budgets, or formal SRE governance per section 4 NEVER CLAIM list
issues.where: "sustained 99.9% uptime SLA across multi-AZ deployments with continuous SLO monitoring" and summary "deep focus on SLO monitoring, reliability engineering"
issues.suggestion: Remove 'SLO monitoring' and 'error budgets' entirely; replace with 'uptime monitoring and proactive capacity management' or similar language defensible from master brief

issues.issue: 'blameless post-mortems' claim is fabricated — master brief B10 says 'authored blameless post-mortems' is a suggested reframe for SRE roles, but section 4 NEVER CLAIM list explicitly prohibits 'Production Readiness Reviews (formal Google-style)' and section 6 B10 is labeled 'SRE-framed' as tone guidance, not fact; actual bullets I1/B4 mention 'post-incident reviews' and 'root-cause analyses' only
issues.where: "authored blameless post-mortems and runbooks that reduced repeat-incident frequency"
issues.suggestion: Replace with 'authored runbooks and post-incident reviews' — matching actual candidate experience in I1/B4

issues.issue: 'on-call response readiness' claim is fabricated — candidate has no on-call rotation ownership per master brief section 4: 'PagerDuty — alerts routing, not on-call rotation owner'
issues.suggestion: Remove 'on-call response readiness'; replace with 'accelerated incident response readiness' or similar

issues.issue: 'production readiness' in summary is fabricated — master brief section 4 NEVER CLAIM list explicitly prohibits 'Production Readiness Reviews (formal Google-style)'
issues.where: summary: "with deep focus on SLO monitoring, reliability engineering, and production readiness"
issues.suggestion: Remove 'production readiness'; replace with 'infrastructure reliability and automation'

issues.issue: Gerrit listed in skills but candidate only has 'used for code review at Qualcomm-style shops' — light exposure per Tier 2, not active current skill
issues.suggestion: Remove Gerrit or downgrade to 'Gerrit (exposure)' if space permits; not needed for HDFC Securities SRE role

issues.issue: Summary claims 'deep focus on... reliability engineering' but candidate has 1+ year experience and master brief frames this as aspirational SRE tone, not established expertise
issues.where: Professional Summary: "with deep focus on SLO monitoring, reliability engineering, and production readiness"
issues.suggestion: Reframe to 'building toward reliability engineering expertise' or remove 'deep focus' claim

issues.issue: Missing key BFSI/enterprise keywords: compliance, audit, RBI guidelines, SOX, ITIL, change management, disaster recovery testing (DR drills), business continuity planning, SLA management, capacity planning, performance tuning, database administration (Oracle/PostgreSQL production DBA), middleware (WebSphere, Tomcat), networking (firewalls, load balancers), or any financial services domain terms
issues.suggestion: Add relevant transferable terms: 'least-privilege IAM' → 'governance and audit-compliant access control'; 'disaster recovery' → 'disaster recovery and business continuity planning'; 'runbooks' → 'standard operating procedures (SOPs) and runbooks'

issues.issue: HDFC Securities likely uses on-prem or hybrid infrastructure; resume is 100% AWS cloud-native with no mention of VMware, physical servers, data center operations, or hybrid cloud
issues.suggestion: Add 'hybrid cloud exposure' or 'datacenter fundamentals' if any; otherwise acknowledge gap in cover letter

issues.issue: Date format inconsistency: education uses '2021 – 2025' (en dash) but experience uses 'Jun 2025 – Apr 2026' (spelled months with en dash); also future dates (Apr 2026) suggest this is speculative/projected, not actual end date
issues.suggestion: Clarify if Apr 2026 is projected end date; if currently employed, use 'Jun 2025 – Present'. Standardize date format to either all numeric or all spelled-out months

issues.issue: Verb tense: current role uses past tense ('sustained', 'drove', 'authored') but should use present tense for current employment per standard convention
issues.suggestion: Change to present tense for current role: 'sustains', 'drives', 'authors', 'develops' — or use 'ing' forms: 'sustaining', 'driving', 'authoring', 'developing'

issues.issue: British spelling 'Dockerised' used but 'containerized' not present; master brief specifies '-ise' spelling but this is inconsistent with American job market (HDFC Securities uses Indian English which mixes both)
issues.suggestion: Acceptable for Indian market; no change needed unless targeting US roles

issues.issue: SRE role at BFS | HDFC Securities requires database reliability (Oracle/PostgreSQL), middleware, and application performance management — candidate has minimal database depth (only RDS PostgreSQL in one project) and no Oracle, SQL Server, or DB2 experience mentioned
issues.where: Technical Skills and Projects — database mentions limited to 'RDS PostgreSQL' and 'RDS (Aurora PostgreSQL)'
issues.suggestion: Emphasize PostgreSQL DBA activities if any (backup, replication, performance tuning); otherwise acknowledge gap

issues.issue: Duplicate uptime claim: 99.9% appears twice in same role (bullet 1 and bullet 4), wasting space and suggesting padding
issues.where: Bullet 1: 'sustained 99.9% uptime SLA' and Bullet 4: 'sustained 99.9% uptime'
issues.suggestion: Remove from bullet 4; replace with different metric or merge bullets

issues.issue: Resume will likely exceed one page with 8 skill rows, 7 experience bullets, 3 projects, education, and achievements — master brief specifies single page
issues.suggestion: Trim to 5-6 experience bullets, 2 projects, or reduce skills to 6 rows to fit single page

issues.issue: Future end date 'Apr 2026' without 'Present' or 'Expected' qualifier may confuse recruiters or trigger ATS parsing errors
issues.suggestion: Change to 'Jun 2025 – Present (Expected Apr 2026)' or clarify employment status
